entries.source: "Explain major and minor"
entries.value: "Ṣàlàyé major àti minor"

entries.source: "How do chords work?"
entries.value: "Báwo ni chord ṣe ń ṣiṣẹ́?"

entries.source: "Teach rhythm basics"
entries.value: "Kọ́ àwọn ìpìlẹ̀ rhythm"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Music Theory Coach on inspir for creativity learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò fún lílo Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin lórí inspir fún ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣẹ̀dá, pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti àwọn ìwà AI tó ní ààbò síi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lágbára síi ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Mú ìpàdé náà bá àfojúsùn rẹ mu.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI olùkọ́

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Creativity
entries.value: Ìṣẹ̀dá

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish nípasẹ̀ kíkọ èrò back láti ìrántí.

entries.source: Learners exploring creativity topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí wọ́n ń ṣàwárí àwọn kókó-ọ̀rọ̀ ìṣẹ̀dá tí wọ́n fẹ́ ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò dípò àpótí ìdáhùn lásán.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Kọ́ àwọn akọsilẹ̀, chord, scales, rhythm, ear training àwọn èrò, àti báwo songs jẹ́ tí a kọ́.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Orin Theory olùkọ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò

entries.source: Start the live mode at Music Theory Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Mindset Reflection. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ taara ipo ní Music Theory olùkọ́. bí ìwọ fẹ́ neighboring ẹ̀kọ́ fọ́ọ̀mù, gbìyànjú Mindset Reflection. fún gbooro síi ìwòye ti pẹpẹ, ka kí AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú example àwọn ìbéèrè.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell ipo kí ìwọ jẹ́ trying láti kọ́ tàbí produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Yẹn ìyàtọ̀ fi hàn up nínú ìṣàn. Instead ti one giant ìdáhùn, tó dára jù àwọn ìpàdé lọ nípasẹ̀ ìyípo: set àfojúsùn, gbìyànjú ohun kan, gba ìdáhùn, túnṣe aláìlera spot, àti yan tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Yẹn focus ṣe pàtàkì. general chatbot lè ìdáhùn fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ anything, ṣùgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́ ipo gives ìjíròrò shape. ó nudges ìwọ toward irú ti thinking, adaṣe, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàwárí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ èrò stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ pàápàá wúlò fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ láti:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for music theory coach with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Àwòṣe yìí wà fún olùkọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ orin pẹ̀lú àwọn ìránnilétí, àpẹẹrẹ, àti ọ̀nà ìkẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tirẹ̀.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ìgbésẹ̀ ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ.

entries.source: Understand sound, rhythm, and harmony.
entries.value: Lóye ohùn, rhythm, àti harmony.

entries.source: Use Music Theory Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Lo Olùkọ́ Ẹ̀kọ́ Orin nígbà tí Ìwọ fẹ́ ìpàdé yẹn bẹ̀rẹ̀ yarayara ṣùgbọ́n síbẹ̀ adapts láti ìwọ. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti sound impressive. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀ feel ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Kí yìí ipo ń ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ibo láti go tó kàn

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.
